q: How to stop sales team from over-promising custom features we can't build
diagnostic: Sales over-promising is a symptom of a disconnected product line. The Prime Visionary agent acts as the Product Guardian, bridging CRM and engineering to block orders that violate the semantic purity of the product.
answer: Sales over-promising is a symptom of a disconnected product line. The Prime Visionary agent acts as the Product Guardian, bridging CRM and engineering to block orders that violate the semantic purity of the product.
description: Intent–action gap — the board agrees on strategy, but engineering and sales execute something completely different.
symptom: Shadow projects discovered months in. Sales promises features engineering deprecated. Resources wasted on conflicting roadmaps.
